items.summary: Three superstars delivered for their countries at the World Cup on Tuesday. But Cristiano Ronaldo could not follow suit on Wednesday as Portugal were held to a surprise draw by DR Congo.

items.title: Substitute Rashford guides home England's fourth against Croatia

items.title: England make flying start to World Cup with thrilling win over Croatia
